result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": true, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "純文件/docstring 變更，未引入新問題；但 diff 可見範圍內 json 模組未 import，屬既有缺陷。", "issues": [{"severity": "major", "confidence": "medium", "category": "correctness", "file": "utils/converter.py", "line_hint": "", "check": "diff 從第 1 行開始，檔案內無 `import json`，但 `to_json` 呼叫 `json.dumps()`。若整個檔案確實沒有 import，執行時會拋 NameError。", "verdict": "此問題非本次 diff 引入（`json.dumps` 行為既有 context），但既然整個檔案頭部可見且無 import，值得確認。", "fix": "在檔案頂部加 `import json`。"}]}
